item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 150430Z AUTO 33004KT CAVOK 04/03 Q1004 TEMPO 4000 BR
🟡 TAF LFOT 142300Z 1500/1524 VRB03KT CAVOK PROB30 TEMPO 1501/1506 4000 BR BECMG 1506/1508 34006KT BKN030 TEMPO 1512/1521 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1513/1518 VRB15G25KT 2000 TSRA BKN030CB
